'''''Ecliptic''''' was a [[Judicial Department/Legends|Judicial Department]] [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class cruiser]]. It was part of a mission dispatched to [[Asmeru/Legends|Asmeru]] in [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]] by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]] to apprehend the leaders of the [[Nebula Front/Legends|Nebula Front]]. ''Ecliptic'' and its sister ship, the [[Prominence (Consular-class)|''Prominence'']], came under attack by Nebula Front forces; while the ''Prominence'' crashed onto Asmeru, ''Ecliptic'' was destroyed when it hit a mine over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] while trying to escape. All twenty of its crew were killed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Cloak of Deception]]'' {{1st}}
